source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 3-4-5 inclined plane is fixed to a rotating turntable. A block rests on the inclined plane and the coefficient of static friction between the inclined plane and the block is $\mu_{s}=1 / 4$. The block is to remain at a position 40 cm from the center of rotation of the turntable (see Fig. 1.62). Find the minimum angular velocity $\omega$ to keep the block from sliding down the plane (toward the center).
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image placeholder string rather than a concrete file path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image placeholder string rather than a concrete file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式写有“see Fig. 1.62”，并且 `requires_image=true`。
题目涉及斜面相对转台中心的空间关系与“toward the center”的方向判断，属于图示常见承载信息。
资产登记中有 1 张已存在图片，`registry_passed=true`，说明图像资源可用。
multi_step: 题目要求求“minimum angular velocity”，通常需要建立临界静摩擦条件，而非直接代入单公式。
需要结合 3-4-5 斜面几何、静摩擦系数、半径 40 cm、以及转动系统中的受力/等效惯性分析。
题干同时包含方向约束“keep the block from sliding down the plane (toward the center)”，意味着需要判定摩擦方向并做条件组合。
这是典型物理多步定量题，步骤数明显高于单步识别或直接读取。
verifiability: 目标变量单一，单位明确，便于后续用物理推导或数值容差规则核验。
题目条件具体（摩擦系数、半径、斜面比例均给出），可独立重算验证。

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A 3-4-5 inclined plane is fixed to a rotating turntable. A block rests on the inclined plane and the coefficient of static friction between the inclined plane and the block is $\mu_{s}=1 / 4$. The block is to remain at a position 40 cm from the center of rotation of the turntable (see Fig. 1.62). Find the minimum angular velocity $\omega$ to keep the block from sliding down the plane (toward the center).
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image placeholder string rather than a concrete file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain:
Solution:
As shown in Fig. 1.63, the forces acting on the block are the gravitational force $m g$, the normal reaction $\mathbf{N}$, the static friction $\mathbf{f}$, and the centrifugal force with $f=\mu_{s} N, P=m \omega^{2} r$. Thus the conditions for equilibrium are
\[
 egin{aligned}
 m g \sin 	heta & =P \cos 	heta+\mu_{s} N \
 N & =m g \cos 	heta+P \sin 	heta .
\end{aligned}
\]

Hence
\[
 m g \sin 	heta=P \cos 	heta+\mu_{s} m g \cos 	heta+\mu_{s} P \sin 	heta
\]
 giving
\[
 P=\left( rac{\sin 	heta-\mu_{s} \cos 	heta}{\cos 	heta+\mu_{s} \sin 	heta}ight) m g=m \omega^{2} r,
\]
 or
\[
 \omega^{2}=\left( rac{\sin 	heta-\mu_{s} \cos 	heta}{\cos 	heta+\mu_{s} \sin 	heta}ight)  rac{g}{r}=\left( rac{ rac{3}{5}- rac{1}{4} \cdot  rac{4}{5}}{ rac{4}{5}+ rac{1}{4} \cdot  rac{3}{5}}ight) \cdot  rac{9.8}{0.4}=10.3
\]
 i.e.
\[
 \omega=3.2 \mathrm{rad} / \mathrm{s}
\]
